input.testCaseTitle: Security Risk in Product API, without authorization data is coming
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-293 reported defect: Security Risk in Product API, without authorization data is coming

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: The Product API returned data without server-side authentication or authorization. The fix added authentication and then Bearer Token authorization on Dev/UAT.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.97. This is the cleanest auth-permissions case in the worksheet.
